display.purpose: Page titles, dashboard hero captions, and major admin headings.

headline.purpose: Modal headings and important panel titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, widget headers, and compact section titles.

body.purpose: Forms, rows, descriptions, and day-to-day task copy.

label.purpose: Table headers, form labels, nav section labels, and compact badges.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Notification panels, dropdowns, and compact floating surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact purple action button for saves, submits, and important workflow actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #6b1e98; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 700 13px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5b21b6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral supporting action for cancel, back, and lower-risk choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 700 13px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e5e7eb; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard compact form field with a visible purple focus treatment.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b7280; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #fff; color: #111; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; font: 400 14px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: 0; border-color: #6b1e98; }

components.name: Dashboard Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest content container for widgets, tables, and dashboard modules.
components.html:
My Tasks

View All
No tasks assigned to you.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; color: #111; } .ds-card-header { padding: 13px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-header h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 700; color: #111; } .ds-card-header a { color: #6b1e98; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-header a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; color: #6b7280; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Selected Chip
components.description: Purple-tinted selected state for filters, departments, and compact tags.
components.css: .ds-chip-selected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 10px; background: #f3e8ff; color: #5b21b6; font: 700 12px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Dark navigation shell item with compact type and purple section language.
components.html:
Company
News & AnnouncementsDocuments
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 228px; background: #111; padding: 12px 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-label { color: #c084fc; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0 16px 6px; } .ds-sidebar-item { display: block; color: #ddd; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: #222; color: #fff; } .ds-sidebar-item.ds-active { background: #2a1438; color: #fff; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic state label with paired tint and readable text.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font: 700 12px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-warning { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; } .ds-status-success { background: #dcfce7; color: #15803d; } .ds-status-danger { background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; } .ds-status-info { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }

narrative.overview:
The Arcon Tools App is a light, task-first internal workspace for busy employees moving between CRM work, documents, HR flows, announcements, dashboards, expense reports, and admin tools. The interface should feel like a competent colleague: organized, direct, and human without becoming playful at the expense of work.

The system is intentionally familiar product UI: system sans typography, compact controls, white content surfaces, a black navigation rail, and Arcon purple used as the signature action and selection color. It rejects generic SaaS polish, beige landing-page warmth, decorative dark mode, enterprise blue-gray stiffness, and rows of same-weight cards. Clarity comes first; delight appears in small brand moments like the Arc wordmark, the purple top stripe, company news, and the dashboard carousel.
keyCharacteristics: Light workspace with dark persistent navigation.
Purple as identity, action, focus, and selected-state color.
Dense but readable pages with small type, clear labels, and strong dividers.
Flat surfaces by default, with shadows reserved for overlays and hover response.
Human internal language over marketing copy.

rules.name: The Purple Earns Its Place Rule
rules.body: Purple is for action, selection, focus, and identity. Do not use it as random decoration on inactive content.

rules.name: The Neutral Workspace Rule
rules.body: The app background is neutral gray, not beige, cream, paper, or blue-gray corporate wash.

rules.name: The Status Pair Rule
rules.body: Status color must pair a tinted background with readable text and a label. Never communicate status by color alone.

rules.name: The Product Sans Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans family across UI labels, buttons, data, and body text. Do not introduce display fonts into product surfaces.

rules.name: The Compact Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Most UI text lives between 11px and 14px. Use weight, color, spacing, and borders before making text larger.

rules.name: The Uppercase Is Functional Rule
rules.body: Uppercase labels are allowed for table headers, nav sections, and compact labels. Do not add all-caps eyebrows to every content section.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards at rest use a white surface plus a 1px border. If every card casts a shadow, the page loses hierarchy.

rules.name: The Overlay Owns The Shadow Rule
rules.body: Strong shadows belong to modals, popovers, and dropdowns. Standard dashboard widgets should stay quiet.

dos: Do use Arcon Purple for primary action, active selection, focus, progress, links, and identity accents.
Do keep the app background neutral gray and content surfaces white.
Do use system sans typography across product UI.
Do keep controls compact: 6-10px radius, 8-16px button padding, 13-14px body/control text.
Do use skeleton states inside content regions instead of centered spinners when rows or cards are loading.
Do make status chips self-describing with text plus color.
Do preserve the black sidebar and purple top stripe as core identity elements.
Do use inline page styles for dashboard/admin page-specific patterns when that matches the existing codebase.
donts: Don't create "SaaS generic" beige-cream warm-neutral backgrounds or all-caps eyebrow headers on every section.
Don't use "dark mode for its own sake"; the product is a light workspace with a dark navigation shell.
Don't drift into "Enterprise blue-gray corporate" styling. The app should stay professional, warm, and efficient.
Don't let "Flat / gray monoculture" flatten hierarchy. Purple and semantic status color should carry meaning.
Don't build "Cluttered card grids" where every tile has the same weight. Vary hierarchy and density by task.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or oversized card radii.
Don't pair a 1px bordered card with a broad decorative shadow. Pick a flat card or a purposeful overlay shadow.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders greater than 1px as a default card/list accent. Status should use labels, icons, text, or full-row tint instead.
Don't skip keyboard focus states or rely on color alone for status.
